title: Teng Li/Items
content:
Treasures
[
]

Golden Armour

He wears a set of extremely durable Golden Armour under his robes

Giant Sword

He wields a 
Nascent Soul
 Treasure Giant Sword that is capable of altering its size to attack a distant target and can produce balls of lightning in great numbers.

Others

Finally, he has at least two life saving treasures including a 
Mystical Bell
 and possesses many defensive treasures too. These treasures are extremely powerful and having them in his possession made Teng Li a significant threat to anyone below the 
Core Formation Stage.
